nasb.text: He said also, “I am the God of your father, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.” Then Moses hid his face, for he was afraid to look at God.

esv.text: And he said, “I am the God of your father, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.” And Moses hid his face, for he was afraid to look at God.

cnv.text: 又說：“我是你父親的　神、亞伯拉罕的　神、以撒的　神、雅各的　神。”摩西因為怕見　神，就把自己的臉蒙住了。

ccb.text: 又说：“我是你祖先的上帝，是亚伯拉罕的上帝，以撒的上帝，雅各的上帝。”摩西害怕看上帝，就把脸蒙起来。
